## What this PR does

<!-- A short summary of the change and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] First build (initial project scaffold)
- [ ] Change (feature or fix on an existing project)

## Checklist

- [ ] Worked on a branch (not `main`)
- [ ] Version bumped (patch for fixes, minor for features)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated alongside the version bump
- [ ] Any new dependencies added to `approved-deps.json`
- [ ] Lint and build pass locally
- [ ] Plugin zip rebuilt and only the current version's zip is present *(WordPress plugins only)*
- [ ] Netlify preview checked *(headless / where relevant)*
